typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		TargetVersion as string,
		solutionstatus as string,
		APPResponsibleDate as timestamp,
		ConsequenceModelEscalationDate as timestamp,
		Rating as string,
		Title as string,
		INSTANCES as integer,
		ResponsibleParty as string,
		App_WFGUID as string,
		FirstDetected as timestamp,
		STATUS as string,
		FeedType as string,
		SolutionGroup as string,
		ValidatedDate as timestamp,
		SN_CIO as string,
		DueDate as timestamp,
		Server_WFGUID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> WFTiTracker
WFTiTracker sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 1,
	mapColumn(
		TargetVersion,
		SolutionStatus = solutionstatus,
		APPResponsibleDate,
		ConsequenceModelEscalationDate,
		Rating,
		Title,
		INSTANCES,
		ResponsibleParty,
		App_WFGUID,
		FirstDetected,
		STATUS,
		FeedType,
		SolutionGroup,
		ValidatedDate,
		SN_CIO,
		DueDate,
		Server_WFGUID
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
